Hitting Your Target Word count

Whether you're an essayist or an SEO copywriter, hitting specific word counts is a daily chore. Too many words, and you lose reader retention. Too few, and search engines deem your content "thin."

Always use a live tool like Tooleva's Free Word Counter to track your progress exactly as you write. Watch your sentence count and character count to ensure your paragraphs don't become massive walls of text.
